findings.issue: Sheet states proficiencyBonus: 3, but at level 1 the Proficiency Bonus is always +2 in D&D 2024 (source: data/classes.json — all classes at level 1 grant PB +2). A PB of +3 is only reached at level 5.
findings.correction: proficiencyBonus must be 2. With PB 2, saving throw proficiencies STR and CON become +4 each (STR 15 mod +2 + PB 2; CON 14 mod +2 + PB 2), and passivePerception 13 is consistent (10 + WIS 12 mod +1 + PB 2 = 13, perception proficient).

findings.issue: Sheet lists only 3 skills [athletics, intimidation, perception]. A Human Fighter with Soldier background must have at minimum 5: Soldier grants athletics + intimidation (data/backgrounds.json → soldier → skills); Fighter grants 2 more class skills (data/classes.json → fighter → choices → fighter-competences, count 2); Human grants 1 additional skill from any list (data/species.json → human → human-competent). That is 2 + 2 + 1 = 5 skills minimum.
findings.correction: skillProficiencies must include the 2 Soldier-granted skills (athletics, intimidation), 2 Fighter class skills (e.g. perception + one more such as survival, history, or acrobatics), and 1 Human bonus skill (e.g. stealth). Total: 5 skills.
